steps.title: Trace the two-part structure
steps.content: The text first gives a specific historical achievement: Whitaker founded the National Newspaper Publishers Association. It then broadens to the National Association of Black Journalists, which preserves Black journalistic history.

steps.title: Match achievement to preservation
steps.content: A invents recruitment. B invents a theory and a changing practice. C says the text compares two careers, which it does not. The structure is a specific achievement followed by an organization that upholds that history. The answer is D.
